chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-239 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.05.2025 Mr. Shahnawaz Ali Kunbhar advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Dhani Bux Mari Assistant P.G a/w SHO of P.S Women (Mehnaz Anwar) <>*<> Respondent No.4 is present in person and files vakalatnama of Mr. Kelash Kolhi advocate on his behalf alongwith statement and copies of certain documents, which are taken on record. Investigation Officer of Crime No.51 of 2025 registered at P.S Kunri District Umerkot is present and submits that statement of petitioner No.1 under Section 164 Cr.P.C was recorded by the learned Judicial Magistrate-I Kunri, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui juris after embracing Islam contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her. The female Investigation Officer submits that she has also moved an application before the learned Judicial Magistrate for age determination of petitioner No.1 through medical examination, which was allowed on 29.04.2025 and the proceedings of Special Medical Board were fixed for today at 10:00, but petitioner No.1 does not intend to appear before the Medical Board. She had produced the photocopies of 164 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1, Order dated 29.04.2025 and Office Order dated 05.05.2055 issued by the Directorate General Health Services Sindh Hyderabad, which are taken on record. Petitioner No.1 present reiterated the contents of memo of petition as well as 164 Cr.P.C statement recorded before the learned Magistrate. Accordingly, Investigation Officer is directed to submit final challan, keeping in view the contents of 164 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days for disposal of the case in accordance with law.

Petitioner No.1 present reiterated the contents of memo of petition as well as 164 Cr.P.C statement recorded before the learned Magistrate. Accordingly, Investigation Officer is directed to submit final challan, keeping in view the contents of 164 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days for disposal of the case in accordance with law. In the meanwhile petitioners be provided protection in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
